blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 163 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
